hero.description: TransKoi - Powered by advanced AI neural network translation technology, providing real-time, accurate, and natural cross-language communication experience. Whether watching movies, making calls, or daily conversations, you can communicate seamlessly.

features.title: Why Choose TransKoi?
features.subtitle: Combining cutting-edge AI technology to create the ultimate translation experience

feature1.title: 🎬 Movie Mode
feature1.description: Real-time translation subtitles when watching foreign films with floating window design that doesn't block the screen. Supports Netflix, YouTube and other mainstream platforms.

feature2.title: 📞 Phone Translation
feature2.description: Automatically translates foreign language calls with real-time conversation display. Supports bidirectional translation for seamless communication with international friends.

feature3.title: 💬 AI Conversation
feature3.description: Practice multilingual conversations with AI assistant, supporting voice input and output. Enhance language learning with natural and fluent translation.

feature4.title: ⚡ Real-time Translation
feature4.description: Neural network-based real-time translation engine with less than 100ms latency. Supports 100+ languages with industry-leading accuracy.

feature5.title: 🔒 Privacy Protection
feature5.description: All translation data is locally encrypted with optional offline mode. Strictly complies with GDPR privacy standards to ensure your data security.

feature6.title: ☁️ Cloud Sync
feature6.description: Sync translation history and common phrases across devices. VIP users enjoy unlimited cloud storage.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive translation solutions from software to hardware

app.title: TransKoi App
app.description: Flagship AI translation app with all core features. Available on iOS and Android, providing seamless cross-language communication experience.

luckyPod.title: LuckyPod
luckyPod.description: Smart translation earbuds with hardware-level translation experience. Built-in AI chip supports real-time voice translation for seamless global communication.

download.title: Ready to Break Language Barriers?
download.description: Download TransKoi now and start barrier-free communication. Free version available forever, VIP unlocks premium features.
download.note: Users in China recommend App Store, overseas users auto-switch to regional stores

footer.description: TransKoi - Connecting the world with AI technology, making communication barrier-free. We are committed to providing users with smarter and more convenient lifestyles through cutting-edge AI and hardware solutions.
